case_title: KEN DREIFACH VS. BRIAN ISLEIB et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,100.00 FILED BY DREIFACH, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT ISLEIB, BRIAN CHEN, BETTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C HO-

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-21-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE OF PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF . DEFENDANT BETTY CHEN WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DREIFACH, KEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ISLEIB, BRIAN CHEN, BETTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
